name: restaurant finance managers processing 10–20 invoices/month tool
description: For restaurant finance managers processing 10–20 invoices/month, inefficient approvals cause late payments to vendors. We streamline the approval process instead of manual approval processes via email and spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Inefficient vendor invoice approval process leading to delays.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Inefficient vendor invoice approval process leading to delays.
locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For restaurant finance managers processing 10–20 invoices/month, inefficient approvals cause late payments to vendors. We streamline the approval process instead of manual approval processes via email and spreadsheets.
locked_fields.current_alternative: manual approval processes via email and spreadsheets

one_liner: For restaurant finance managers processing 10–20 invoices/month, inefficient approvals cause late payments to vendors. We streamline the approval process instead of manual approval processes via email and spreadsheets.
